ddls:
CREATE TABLE "iterations" (
  "iteration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each iteration */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the iteration belongs to */,
  "iteration_number" INTEGER /* Number of the iteration within the project */,
  "mean_output" REAL /* Mean output of the iteration */,
  "std_dev_output" REAL /* Standard deviation of the output */,
  "var_output" REAL /* Variance of the output */,
  "mean_algorithm" REAL /* Mean algorithm performance */,
  "std_dev_algorithm" REAL /* Standard deviation of the algorithm performance */,
  "var_algorithm" REAL /* Variance of the algorithm performance */,
  "mean_performance" REAL /* Mean performance metric */,
  "std_dev_performance" REAL /* Standard deviation of the performance metric */,
  "var_performance" REAL /* Variance of the performance metric */,
  "last_performance" REAL /* Last performance value */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Time when the iteration started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Time when the iteration ended */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the iteration in seconds */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the iteration (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "iteration_config_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the configuration used for the iteration */,
  "comments_count" INTEGER /* Number of comments associated with the iteration */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for easy categorization and searching (comma-separated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("iteration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_iterations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "lead_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead user for the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, completed, on hold) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "actual_cost" REAL /* Actual cost incurred for the project */,
  "estimated_completion_date" TEXT /* Estimated date of project completion */,
  "current_phase" TEXT /* Current phase of the project (e.g., planning, execution, review) */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for easy categorization and searching (comma-separated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_lead_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, engineer, researcher) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or title of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "iteration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the iteration the comment is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment has been resolved */,
  "resolution_text" TEXT /* Text of the resolution, if applicable */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_iteration_id FOREIGN KEY ("iteration_id") REFERENCES iterations ("iteration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "iteration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the iteration the metric is associated with */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric (e.g., seconds, percentage, MB) */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric (e.g., performance, accuracy, loss) */,
  "is_key_metric" INTEGER /* Indicates if the metric is a key performance indicator (KPI) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_iteration_id FOREIGN KEY ("iteration_id") REFERENCES iterations ("iteration_id")
)
